home.eyebrow: Corporate Safety and Event Medical Cover
home.headline: Certified First Aid Trainer and Event Medical Service
home.subheadline: Professional expertise for corporate safety and event medical coverage.
home.introTitle: Professional Safety You Can Rely On
home.welcome: As a certified first aid trainer and experienced emergency medical technician, I offer far more than medical presence on site. I combine structured knowledge transfer with years of operational emergency experience to elevate safety standards in your company or event environment.

proof.one: Trust advantage: Verified trainer certification and active emergency experience create immediate credibility.
proof.two: Dual benefit: You receive both operational medical cover and practical staff training from one expert.
proof.three: Clear USP: Few providers combine certified training competence with active rescue service experience.

training.title: Training and Prevention
training.intro: Use my training competence to strengthen your internal emergency organization:

inhouse.title: In-house Training
inhouse.text: Hands-on first aid courses and emergency training sessions directly at your company.

consulting.title: Professional Consulting
consulting.text: Support in creating and optimizing your internal safety and emergency concepts.

coaching.title: Prevention Coaching
coaching.text: Awareness training for medical emergencies and preventive action across teams.

operations.title: Operational Medical Service (Freelance Basis)
operations.intro: Professional medical event cover delivered by an experienced expert:

events.title: Event Coverage
events.text: Professional first response at corporate events, sports tournaments, and public gatherings.

crisis.title: Crisis-Proof Response
crisis.text: Confident intervention in critical situations backed by more than 6 years in active emergency response.

documentation.title: Legally Secure Documentation
documentation.text: Complete documentation and compliance with current medical standards for organizer protection.

authority.title: Authority
authority.text: As a trainer, I maintain deep and up-to-date specialist knowledge and apply it precisely.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.text: Freelance collaboration without long-term staffing commitment, ideal for project-based operations.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.text: Commercial training combined with medical expertise ensures smooth administrative handling.

security.title: Safety
security.text: Professional equipment included: emergency backpack, diagnostics, and airway management tools.

areas.title: Service Areas
areas.business: Corporate Safety: Training and consulting for companies and institutions.
areas.events: Event Management: Medical cover for corporate, sports, and cultural events.
areas.b2b: B2B Support: Freelance support for rescue services, schools, and event agencies.

finalCta.title: Tailored Offer for Your Next Project
finalCta.text: I would be glad to prepare a custom quote for your training projects or event medical coverage.

about.headline: Serving you with heart and dedication
about.text: Alltagshelfer Plus was founded with one clear goal: we want people to live at home for as long and as happily as possible. Our team consists of dedicated people who not only provide practical help, but also take time for a friendly conversation. We are not just a service provider, but real companions in your daily life.

services.headline: How we support you in daily life
services.intro: We adapt our services flexibly to your life situation.

daily.title: Daily assistance
daily.text: Support with getting up, going to bed, choosing clothes, and structuring the daily routine.

household.title: Household & shopping
household.text: Shopping together, running errands, light cleaning tasks, and laundry care.

leisure.title: Leisure & companionship
leisure.text: Support for walks, cooking together, games, reading aloud, or simply listening.

organization.title: Organization & appointments
organization.text: Support for doctor visits or authorities, help with pet care or plant care.

aftercare.title: Hospital aftercare
aftercare.text: Reliable support in the first period after a hospital stay.

pricing.headline: Transparent costs & billing with care insurance
pricing.text: Good care must be affordable. If you have a recognized care level (1 to 5), our services can usually be billed directly via the relief amount (§ 45b SGB XI) or respite care through the care insurance funds.

first.title: Free initial consultation
first.text: We get to know each other and determine your needs.

billing.title: Billing
billing.text: We support you with applications and, on request, bill directly with the insurance fund.

career.headline: Become part of our team!
career.text: You have a big heart, are reliable, and enjoy working with people? Then we are looking for you as a daily companion.

benefits.flexible: Flexible working hours (part-time, full-time, or mini-job)

career.success: Thank you! Your application has been submitted.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: After our initial consultation, we can usually start support within a few days.
faq.a2: No, continuity is important to us. You will be assigned a fixed contact person to build a real relationship of trust.

contact.headline: Direct Contact to Your Safety Expert
contact.intro: Choose professional safety support. I will gladly prepare a tailored offer for your training projects or medical coverage for your next event.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

whyStrong.one: Immediate trust: Certified trainer status gives clients confidence in your qualification.
whyStrong.two: Two-in-one value: You offer event medical service and staff training in one expert package.
whyStrong.three: Strong USP: Combining certified instruction and active rescue operations is a clear differentiator.
